name: Norimizu Ameya
description: Jaibo is a member of the Litchi Hikari Club. He is obsessively in love with Zera, the leader of the club, and stops at nothing to be with him. He is classified as a Yandere-type character. ~!After he reveals to be the cause of the destruction of the Litchi Hikari Club due to Zera becoming infatuated with Kanon rather than him, he confesses his true feelings to Zera before having Litchi crush his head, killing him.!~

name: P-ko
description: __Height__: 130cm A young red-haired girl who grows vegetables for the village. She believes she is a ninja, though in reality she is the vision of a klutzy girl and is literally dangerously clumsy, often turning what should be a simple accident into a massive disaster. Despite an allusion to mishaps, P-ko is still intent on getting a drivers license so that she can travel further during Winter to gather seeds. name: Penguin
description: He is a regular customer at Shirokuma Cafe and a friend of Shirokuma. He has a crush on a lady penguin, Penko, who works at a bakery. He is weak to alcoholic beverages.

name: Ryoh Grantz
description: A Divine Visionary and the captain of the Magic Security Forces. Unlike most members of the country, Ryou has no problem with magicless people, as long as they impress him. He also has a big ego, and sees himself as a star to the point of narrating his own actions.

description: Tsukushi Makino is the main female character, and is one of the very few students at the prestigious Eitoku University to come from an "unwealthy" family. name: Yoru
description: Ikuto's Guardian Character, Yoru, has cat-like features. He wears a pair of paw gloves and boots and dresses in punk fashion style.
